challenge.title: Korak 16
challenge.description:
Sada možete uraditi nešto slično da dodate emotikon takođe nakon naslova.

Kreirajte selektor koji cilja pseudo-element ::after elementa h1. Dajte mu svojstvo content i postavite njegovu vrednost na " 🥳" (primetite da postoji razmak pre emotikona).

challengeFiles.name: index
challengeFiles.contents:
Happy Birthday!

Wishing you all the happiness and joy on your special day!

Send Card Share on Social Media

Sending your card...

Card successfully sent to your recipient!

Sharing your card...

Your card was shared on social media!

challengeFiles.name: styles

tests.text: Selektor h1::after bi trebalo da ima svojstvo content set do " 🥳".
